zh.lifeSummary: 當Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté於大約1075年出生在法國布格時，她的父親Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne57歲，母親Étiennette de Longwy-Metz42歲。她於1090年與Humbert II de Savoie在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1135年5月在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利享年61歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté于大约1075年出生在法国布格时，她的父亲Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne57岁，母亲Étiennette de Longwy-Metz42岁。她于1090年与Humbert II de Savoie在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1135年5月在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利享年61岁，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊哈恩貝利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gisèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

variants.name: Gisella
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté was born about 1075, in Burgundy, France, her father, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, was 57 and her mother, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, was 42. She married Humbert II de Savoie in 1090, in Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in May 1135, in Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 61, and was buried in Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté est née environ 1075, à Bourgogne, France, son père, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Humbert II de Savoie en 1090, à Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en mai 1135, à Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté um 1075 in Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne 57 und ihre Mutter Étiennette de Longwy-Metz 42. Sie hat 1090 in Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Humbert II de Savoie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Mai 1135 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté è nata il circa 1075 nel Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Humbert II de Savoie nel 1090, nel Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1135, nel Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comtéが約1075年にフランスボウルゴグンで生まれた時，父Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogneは57歳，母Étiennette de Longwy-Metzは42歳であった。1090年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイチャンブeリーでHumbert II de Savoieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1135年5月にフランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイチャンブeリーで61歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイチャンブeリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté(이)가 대략 1075년 프랑스 부르고그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Étiennette de Longwy-Metz(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1090년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 챔브e리에서 Humbert II de Savoie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1135년 5월 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 챔브e리에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 챔브e리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté nasceu aproximadamente 1075, em Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Humbert II de Savoie em 1090, em Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em maio de 1135, em Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté родилась около 1075 г. в местности бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humbert II de Savoie в 1090 г. в местности чамбeри, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла май 1135 г. в местности чамбeри, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности чамбeри, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté nació aproximadamente 1075, en Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Humbert II de Savoie en 1090, en Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1135, en Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Chambéry, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
